embedData.html: <style>.cmp-tbl th{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);text-align:left}.cmp-tbl td{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);vertical-align:top;line-height:1.6}.cmp-tbl tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}.cmp-tbl td:first-child{color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;width:120px}.cmp-img{width:100%;height:80px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.75);border-radius:2px;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}.cmp-noimg{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:6px}.pc-cmp{position:absolute;top:42px;right:10px;background:rgba(7,17,28,.75);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;opacity:0;z-index:3;font-family:inherit}.pc:hover .pc-cmp,.pc-cmp.in-cmp{opacity:1}.pc-cmp:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.1)}.pc-cmp.in-cmp{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,169,110,.15)}#sec-toc{position:fixed;right:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:3000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}#sec-toc.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}@media(max-width:900px){#sec-toc{display:none}}@media print{#sec-toc{display:none!important}}.toc-dot{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;cursor:pointer}.toc-dot-inner{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid rgba(201,169,110,.4);background:transparent;transition:all .25s;flex-shrink:0}.toc-dot:hover .toc-dot-inner,.toc-dot.active .toc-dot-inner{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold);width:9px;height:9px}.toc-label{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transform:translateX(6px);transition:all .2s;pointer-events:none}.toc-dot:hover .toc-label{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}#print-btn{font-size:8px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}#print-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}#print-btn svg{flex-shrink:0}@media print{*{-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact!important;print-color-adjust:exact!important}#scroll-progress,#back-top,#wafloat,#qfloat,#cmp-bar,#modal-detail,#modal-cmp,.modal-overlay,nav,#sbar,#sub-pills,.cover,#xidmetler,#contact,footer,.skip-link,#print-btn{display:none!important}body{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;margin:0;padding:0}.print-header{display:block!important}#overview{padding:16px 24px!important}.sec-eye{color:#888!important;font-size:8px!important}.sec-h2{color:#111!important;font-size:18px!important}.pgrid{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)!important;gap:12px!important;padding:0!important}.pc{background:#f9f9f9!important;border:1px solid #ddd!important;border-radius:4px!important;break-inside:avoid!important;page-break-inside:avoid!important}.pc.hidden{display:none!important}.pc-thumb{height:100px!important}.pc-img{height:100px!important}.pc-body{padding:8px!important}.pc-name{color:#111!important;font-size:10px!important}.pc-code{color:#666!important;font-size:8px!important}.pc-ul li{color:#444!important;font-size:8px!important}.pc-meta{border-top:1px solid #eee!important}.pc-meta span{color:#555!important;font-size:8px!important}.pc-add,.pc-cmp,.pc-badges{display:none!important}.bdg-haccp,.bdg-eco{display:inline-block!important;font-size:7px!important;color:#333!important;background:#eee!important;border:1px solid #ccc!important}.cat-head{color:#111!important}a{text-decoration:none!important;color:inherit!important}@page{margin:16mm 12mm;size:A4}}.print-header{display:none;padding:0 0 14px;margin-bottom:16px;border-bottom:2px solid #C9A96E}.print-header h2{margin:0 0 2px;font-size:16px;color:#111;letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:700}.print-header p{margin:0;font-size:9px;color:#666}.print-header .ph-meta{font-size:8px;color:#999;margin-top:4px}#qfloat-cnt{background:var(--bg);color:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;width:19px;height:19px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--gold);line-height:1}#qbasket-box{background:rgba(201,169,110,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:16px;display:none}.qb-title{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}.qb-list{list-style:none;max-height:90px;overflow-y:auto}.qb-list li{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);padding:2px 0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.qb-list li span.qb-code{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:auto}</style>
